stories.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is extended by 3 weeks as tensions rise in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Hezbollah and Israel traded fire just hours after the ceasefire extension was announced, underscoring its fragility.

stories.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire. And, Trump eases medical marijuana rules
stories.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks, President Trump says. And, the Trump administration is easing rules on medical marijuana.

stories.title: Thousands of seafarers stranded by ongoing U.S. blockade on Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: As the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports drags on, thousands of seafarers are stranded on ships, and economic shockwaves ripple around the world.

stories.title: French police probe suspected weather device tampering after odd Polymarket bet
stories.description: The incident is the latest eyebrow-raising bet on Polymarket, as allegations of rigging and manipulation continue to haunt the popular prediction market site.

stories.title: Airlines in Europe slash thousands of flights as Iran war cuts jet fuel supplies
stories.description: The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fuel shortage if supplies aren't replenished soon.

stories.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
stories.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the Secretary of the Navy is out of the role.

stories.title: Trump announces a 3-week extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: President Trump said Thursday that Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks after the two sides met at the White House for a high-level negotiation.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
stories.description: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.

stories.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
stories.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

stories.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches
stories.description: Iran's chief negotiator says "violations" by the US and Israel make it impossible to open the strait.

stories.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
stories.description: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.

stories.title: Tracking ships under fire in the Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran's top negotiator says it's "not possible to reopen" the strait due to "blatent violations" of US-Iran ceasefire.

stories.title: US and Iran 'locked in war of words' says Lyse Doucet
stories.description: The US confirmed on Tuesday night that the Vice-President's trip to Pakistan for a second round of peace talks has been cancelled.

stories.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in Strait of Hormuz after vessels attacked
stories.description: One of the cargo ships was 'heavily damaged' by Iranian forces, a British maritime agency reported on Wednesday.

stories.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
stories.description: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

stories.title: Why and how is US blockading Iranian ports in Strait of Hormuz?
stories.description: Donald Trump says that the US is blockading the Strait of Hormuz. What does this mean in practice?

stories.title: Lebanon: 'Catastrophic' state of Israeli-occupied South
stories.description: "It's catastrophic." Jad Shahrour describes the state of his native Southern #Lebanon under Israeli occupation. More on #F24Debate ➡️ https://f24.my/BsPh

stories.title: Sanchez brushes off reported Pentagon email mulling suspending Spain's NATO membership
stories.description: Spain's centre-left Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Friday declined to comment on a reported Pentagon email written by top policy adviser Elbridge Colby raising the possibility of suspending Madrid from the NATO military alliance. The note reportedly also suggested reconsidering ...

stories.title: Iran Peace Talks: Trump's unconventional diplomacy on display
stories.description: “It’s Donald Trump’s world, we’re all just living in it.” His approach to diplomacy is unconventional, but ultimately, Trump will have the final say regarding an #IranWar exit strategy, Douglas Heye tells #F24Debate ➡️ https://f24.my/BsD9

stories.title: India-Pakistan ties 'not good', a year after Kashmir attack
stories.description: A year after the deadly terror attack in Kashmir, relations between India and Pakistan remain at an all-time low. Since then, Islamabad has emerged as a key mediator seeking to end the war in Iran. On Access Asia, we're joined by Indian MP Dr Shashi Tharoor to find out what India...

stories.title: US Defense Secretary Hegseth: 'US blockade has gone global'
stories.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Operation Epic Fury has achieved a decisive result in just weeks, focused on preventing Iran from developing nuclear weapons. He noted the mission is entering a new phase, giving Iran the chance to pursue a “good and wise” peace deal, while emp...

He noted the mission is entering a new phase, giving Iran the chance to pursue a “good and wise” peace deal, while emp...

stories.title: UN peacekeeper dies of wounds in Lebanon
stories.description: The UN mission in Lebanon said Friday that an Indonesian peacekeeper has died from wounds sustained in a March 29 attack on his base. Arriving at an EU summit in Cyprus, French President Emmanuel Macron urged the European Union to “intensify its efforts” to help restore stability...

stories.title: 'The world bailed out the banks, no one is bailing out the children,' UNICEF says
stories.description: In an interview with FRANCE 24, UNICEF global spokesperson James Elder discussed the situation in Lebanon, where "critical infrastructure that girls and boys rely on" have been targeted, giving Lebanese people "a sense that there really is nowhere safe". He also declared that hum...

stories.title: US has three aircraft carriers in the Middle East for first time since 2003
stories.description: As tensions ramp up amid fragile truce, US military says it 'redirected' 34 vessels as part of blockade on Iran's ports.

stories.title: PM Sanchez rebuffs US idea of suspending Spain from NATO
stories.description: PM Sanchez responded to reports that the US may suspend Madrid from NATO over its opposition to the war on Iran.

stories.title: Iran-Iraq Tanker War redux? Why the Strait of Hormuz crisis is different
stories.description: The Tanker War between Iran and Iraq in the 1980s also disrupted global shipping. But the situation today is different.

stories.title: Iranians bring music to sites devastated by US-Israeli attacks
stories.description: Iranian musicians perform on city streets and venture to sites devastated in US-Israeli attacks.

stories.title: US Navy authorised to target Iranian fast boats in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Hegseth says President Trump authorised the navy to target Iranian fast boats in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Iranian FM Araghchi to visit Pakistan in step towards US talks resumption
stories.description: As Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks, twin-city residents face road closures, halted courts and growing economic strain.

stories.title: What’s been happening during the Lebanon ceasefire?
stories.description: Trump has extended the Lebanon ceasefire by 3 weeks. But Israel has been accused of using the truce to further its war.

stories.title: With 3,000 containers stuck in Pakistan, Iran explores more land routes
stories.description: Documents seen by Al Jazeera say Iran is seeking land transit for stranded sea cargo to bypass US blockade.

stories.title: Netanyahu says he was successfully treated for prostate cancer
stories.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Friday that he had received successful treatment for early-stage prostate cancer, without specifying when the treatment took place. In a statement on social media, as his annual medical report was released, Netanyahu, 76, said an ...

stories.title: US has exhausted billions of dollars worth of weapons stockpile in war on Iran: NYT report
stories.description: The United States has drained much of its weapons stockpile, totalling up to billions of dollars, in its war on Iran, according to a New York Times investigation. The weapons, as per the NYT, included over 1,200 Patriot interceptor missiles — each worth more than $4 million. Acco...

stories.title: Spain is 'reliable' Nato member, PM Sanchez says after reported US ouster threat
stories.description: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Friday stressed his country was a “reliable member” of Nato, after a report the United States was considering possibly trying to expel Spain over its refusal to support operations in the Middle East war. Reuters news agency cited an anonymo...

stories.title: Trump rules out N-option amid Hormuz struggle
stories.description: • US president says in no hurry to end war, claims ‘total control’ over strait, orders navy to destroy all mine-laying vessels• Another Iranian tanker seized in Indian Ocean as country banks first proceeds from Hormuz tolls• Tehran air defence activated overnight• Third aircraft ...

stories.title: Pakistan rejects Indian propaganda on Pahalgam attack, deplores 'weaponisation of false narrative'
stories.description: Pakistan rejected Indian propaganda linking it to the 2025 Pahalgam attack on Thursday, deploring that the neighbouring country was focusing on “weaponising its false narrative” in the midst on an ongoing regional crisis. The April 22, 2025 attack in Pahalgam saw 26 people, mostl...

stories.title: US Navy Secretary Phelan fired by Pentagon, say sources
stories.description: Navy Secretary John Phelan has been fired, a US official and a person familiar with the matter said on Wednesday, in another wartime shakeup at the Pentagon coming just weeks after Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth ousted the Army’s top general. The Pentagon announced his departure ...

stories.title: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi to reach Pakistan tonight for talks with U.S.: report
stories.description: U.S. delegation would likely arrive in Islamabad on April 25, once the Iranian delegation works out the framework of talks with the U.S. technical team

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Iran's FM Araghchi confirms 'timely' visit to Islamabad; Muscat, Moscow also part of tour
stories.description: IRNA news agency said the delegation will “hold bilateral consultations on developments in the region, as well as the latest situation” in the war

stories.title: Netanyahu treated for early-stage prostate cancer, says he is in ‘excellent’ physical condition
stories.description: The Israeli PM said he requested a delay in the publication of his annual medical report to not allow Iran to ‘spread even more false propaganda’ amidst the war

stories.title: Trump says U.S. in no rush but 'clock is ticking' for Iran
stories.description: Mr. Trump, who on April 23, 2026, ruled out the use of a nuclear weapon against Iran, had earlier ordered the U.S. Navy to destroy any Iranian boat caught laying mines in Hormuz

stories.title: Pakistan repays $3.45 billion loan to UAE
stories.description: The UAE had asked for the immediate return of the funds in the wake of the recent situation in West Asia following the U.S.-Israel war on Iran

stories.title: West Asia conflict could cause 120 bcm of LNG supply loss from 2026-2030, says International Energy Agency
stories.description: LNG supply growth came to a halt in March after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, which effectively reduced ‌the combined LNG production of Qatar and ​the United Arab Emirates by around 10 bcm for the month

stories.title: Trump to send Witkoff, Kushner to Pakistan for talks with Iran — CNN
stories.description: According to the sources, Vice President JD Vance does not plan to participate in the talks for now

stories.title: Iran calls on SCO to develop cooperation in area of arms control
stories.description: Iranian Ambassador to Russia Kazem Jalali noted that it is necessary to use the SCO’s crisis-settlement potential and organize special meetings to strengthen arms control mechanisms

stories.title: Iran to make no concessions in talks with US — Iranian vice president
stories.description: Esmail Saghab Esfahani emphasized that the enemy had failed to achieve any of the goals

stories.title: NATO officers in Ukraine and new anti-Russian sanctions: Foreign Ministry’s statements
stories.description: Russian Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova pointed out that Brussels inflicts harm to itself and undermines its energy security by imposing sanctions against Moscow
